title: 24 Pack Snowflake Cupcake Toppers Glitter Winter Wonderland Snowflake Theme Cupcake Picks Decoration for Baby Shower Xmas Birthday Party Cake Decorations Supplies Silver Pink
features: Package and Size: Includes 24 Pack snowflake cupcake toppers, these novel and cute cupcake picks will add more fun.The size is 2.6*4.9 inch / 2.4*5 inch / 2.5*5.1 inch / 2.2*5.2 inch / 2.5*5.2 inch / 2.4*5.2 inch ( including stick )

Widely Application: These cupcake toppers are so cute and perfect for snowflake theme party, winter frozen theme party, winter wonderland theme party, christmas theme party, snowflake theme christmas baby shower birthday party cupcake decorations. They will be good decoration and make your cupcake more attractive and interesting.You can also apply them for ice cream, fruits, cookies and other desserts.

Premium Material: These cupcake toppers are made of high quality 300 gram glitter thick card stock. they are very so safe to be suitable for cupcakes,cookies,cakes,fruits,cookies,ice cream and other desserts.
NO DIY: These cupcake toppers are pre-assembled, so you can insert into your cupcake directly after received, which can save your time.
Reminder ! These cupcake toppers are single-sided glitter, the backside is plain white. Only for decoration purposes, this is not edible and please do NOT use it in oven or microwave.
description: Package and Size Package includes 24 pcs snowflake cupcake toppers, all cupcake toppres are assembled well. the size is 2.6*4.9 inch / 2.4*5 inch / 2.5*5.1 inch / 2.2*5.2 inch / 2.5*5.2 inch / 2.4*5.2 inch ( with stick ) Material and Application These cupcake toppers are made of high-quality 300 gram thick card stock, they are perfect for snowflake theme party, winter frozen theme party, winter wonderland theme party, christmas theme party, snowflake theme christmas baby shower birthday party cupcake decorations. which make your cupcake more attractive and interesting. Important Note Due to the light and screen difference, the item's color may be slightly different from the pictures. These cupcake toppers are for decoration purposes only, not edible and do not place in oven or use for baking. These cupcake toppers are single-sided glitter, another side is plain white. Xsstarmi is our own brand, which is registered on amazon. The purpose of our brand is make your party attractive and interesting, Our highest priority is your satisfaction!
